hero.title: Fullstack Developer
hero.tagline: Backend-oriented developer building scalable systems with Node.js, Nest.js & React.

about.heading: About me
about.paragraph1: I'm Yesid Hernandez, a fullstack developer with <years>6 years</years> of experience. I focus on backend systems and APIs, using Node.js, NestJS, React, and Next.js as my primary stack. I also work with PHP and Laravel, and have solid experience with SQL and NoSQL databases, cloud (AWS, Azure), Docker, and event-driven architectures with Kafka and Redis.
about.paragraph2: I enjoy designing and implementing maintainable services and clean APIs, and I'm always improving my skills in Go and system design.

contact.heading: Get in touch
contact.subheading: Open to new opportunities and collaborations.

eggPage.title: This is not a bug
eggPage.body: You followed an almost invisible link. Respect. There's no opening for Chief Easter Egg Officer yet — but we can talk about real roles.

duck.speech: I'm the rubber duck — I help you debug. Quack responsibly.
